parameters.query:
WITH owner_user AS (
  SELECT id
  FROM inbox.users
  WHERE telegram_user_id = $1::bigint
    AND status = 'active'
  LIMIT 1
),
search_query AS (
  SELECT websearch_to_tsquery('simple', $2::text) AS value
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    knowledge.id,
    knowledge.title,
    knowledge.summary,
    knowledge.content,
    knowledge.source_url,
    projects.name AS project,
    categories.name AS category,
    item_types.name AS item_type,
    priorities.name AS priority,
    ts_rank_cd(
      to_tsvector('simple', concat_ws(' ', knowledge.title, knowledge.summary, knowledge.content)),
      search_query.value
    ) AS score
  FROM inbox.knowledge_items AS knowledge
  JOIN owner_user ON owner_user.id = knowledge.user_id
  CROSS JOIN search_query
  LEFT JOIN inbox.projects ON projects.id = knowledge.project_id
  LEFT JOIN inbox.categories ON categories.id = knowledge.category_id
  LEFT JOIN inbox.item_types ON item_types.id = knowledge.item_type_id
  LEFT JOIN inbox.priorities ON priorities.id = knowledge.priority_id
  WHERE to_tsvector('simple', concat_ws(' ', knowledge.title, knowledge.summary, knowledge.content)) @@ search_query.value
     OR concat_ws(' ', knowledge.title, knowledge.summary, knowledge.content) ILIKE ('%' || $2::text || '%')
  ORDER BY score DESC, knowledge.updated_at DESC
  LIMIT 8
)
SELECT
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM owner_user) AS authorized,
  COALESCE((SELECT id::text FROM owner_user), '') AS user_id,
  $2::text AS query,
  $3::text AS chat_id,
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object(
      'knowledge_item_id', id::text,
      'title', title,
      'summary', summary,
      'content', left(content, 1200),
      'source_url', source_url,
      'project', project,
      'category', category,
      'item_type', item_type,
      'priority', priority,
      'score', score
    )) FROM ranked),
    '[]'::jsonb
  ) AS lexical_results;

WITH conversation_row AS (
  INSERT INTO inbox.conversations (user_id, channel, external_conversation_id)
  SELECT $1::uuid, 'telegram', $2::text
  WHERE $5::boolean
  ON CONFLICT (user_id, channel, external_conversation_id) DO UPDATE SET updated_at = now()
  RETURNING id
),
user_message AS (
  INSERT INTO inbox.messages (conversation_id, role, content, metadata)
  SELECT id, 'user', $3::text, jsonb_build_object('kind', 'knowledge_search')
  FROM conversation_row
  RETURNING conversation_id
),
assistant_message AS (
  INSERT INTO inbox.messages (conversation_id, role, content, metadata)
  SELECT conversation_id, 'assistant', $4::text, jsonb_build_object('kind', 'knowledge_search_result')
  FROM user_message
  RETURNING conversation_id
)
SELECT $2::text AS chat_id, $4::text AS response;
